seoTitle: South Tammin vs South Yelbeni — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Tammin and South Yelbeni. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Tammin vs South Yelbeni: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Tammin and South Yelbeni.
heading: South Tammin vs South Yelbeni — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Tammin, Western Australia and South Yelbeni, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Yelbeni has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to South Tammin (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Tammin or South Yelbeni safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Tammin has a flood risk score of 39/100, while South Yelbeni scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Tammin scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. South Yelbeni scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Tammin or South Yelbeni?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Yelbeni has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
